objects.name: Analytic 1646
objects.description: Defender correlates an app enumerating installed packages (PackageManager queries or shell 'pm list packages') with selective checks for high-value targets (banking/identity/security apps) and near-term persistence/egress of the inventory. Chain: capability to query apps → burst of enumeration calls or shell listing → optional foreground target detection → local inventory file → small POST to remote endpoint.

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: android:logcat
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: PackageManager getInstalledApplications|getInstalledPackages|getPackagesHoldingPermissions burst for <pkg>. TYPE_WINDOW_STATE_CHANGED shows foreground app then immediate package queries by <pkg>

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: android:logcat
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Command 'pm list packages' executed by app sandbox or child proc

x_mitre_mutable_elements.description: Max time from enumeration to persist/exfil (e.g., 10–120s).
Minimum count of package queries or listed rows to treat as inventory (e.g., ≥50).
List of sensitive app package prefixes (banking/IdP/AV/MDM) to raise severity.
Regex for inventory artifacts in the app container.
Known-good analytics/CDN endpoints to suppress FPs.
Work Profile/Kiosk/Jamf/Intune policy context to scope benign inventory jobs.
